overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tribal village built into massive organic tree-like structures during a vibrant pink sunset. The character traverses elevated wooden walkways, passes through a covered tunnel, enters a communal hut with NPCs gathered around fire pits, and exits back to the exterior village pathways.

events.description: approaching and entering covered tunnel archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along elevated wooden pathway through the tribal village, approaching a tunnel entrance

entered.detail: elevated pathway made of wooden planks winding through the village
large tree-like building with carved wooden details and warm lantern light
arched tunnel entrance made of woven organic materials and wood

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated wooden walkway in a tribal village built into massive organic structures. Warm lantern light glows from carved wooden buildings as the character walks forward toward a tunnel archway. The sky is partially visible with a dusky pink hue, and the environment is quiet with no other characters present.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered tunnel passage with woven walls leading to open terrace

events.description: exiting tunnel to reveal dramatic pink sunset sky and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit tunnel and ascending wooden stairs toward the exit

entered.detail: vibrant pink and purple sunset sky visible through the tunnel exit
steep wooden staircase leading upward through the village structures

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow enclosed tunnel with woven walls, transitioning from the semi-covered walkway to a darker passage. At around 20 seconds, the tunnel opens to reveal a stunning pink sunset sky. The character continues ascending wooden stairs, with the lighting shifting from artificial warmth to natural dusk colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: communal gathering hut with fire pits and seated villagers

events.description: entering large communal hut with fire pits and multiple NPCs
approaching hut exit with bright daylight becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the communal hut observing villagers sitting by fire pits and engaging in daily activities

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on woven mat near fire pit, appears to be crafting or resting

entered.detail: large circular hut interior with woven walls and ceiling supports
burning fire pit providing warm orange illumination to the space
textured woven reed or bamboo matting covering the hut floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a communal hut filled with warm firelight and moderate crowds of NPCs sitting on woven mats. The space is enclosed with woven walls and lit by fire pits. Villagers are scattered throughout, some sitting and crafting. As the character moves through, they approach the far exit where bright daylight becomes visible, signaling the transition back outdoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior village pathway with thatched roof huts and ascending stairs

events.description: exiting communal hut to bright outdoor village area with thatched structures

agents.ego_description: walking up exterior wooden stairs through the village, passing other villagers

notable_agents.action: group of villagers walking down the path in the opposite direction

entered.detail: traditional hut with layered thatched roofing and wooden supports
open-air wooden pathway with grass and vegetation visible alongside

segments.scene_description: The character exits the communal hut into bright outdoor light, transitioning from the fire-lit interior to a sunlit exterior pathway. The scene features thatched roof huts and wooden stairs ascending through the village. Sparse crowds of villagers walk in the opposite direction as the character continues upward through the tribal settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a tribal village, transitioning from quiet elevated walkways into a crowded communal interior before emerging back into the open air. It begins on a wooden path illuminated by warm lanterns under a dusky pink sky, moving steadily toward a narrow tunnel with woven walls. As the character passes through this enclosed passage, the view opens up to a stunning pink sunset and ascending stairs where artificial light gives way to natural dusk colors. The scene then shifts into a communal hut filled with the glow of fire pits and villagers gathered on woven mats, before the camera pushes toward a bright exit. Finally, the character emerges from the fire-lit interior back into the sunlit exterior, ascending through a settlement of thatched roofs and passing sparse crowds of villagers.
